headline: Visual Problem Solver | Partner to Brands & Event Producers | Identity, Print & Live Experiences
about:
I’m a visual storyteller. What I deliver is creative leadership, a focus on concept development and problem solving, dedication to detail, and probably a few puns that slip in along the way.  

I believe in the power of collaboration, a receptive attitude, being present, and the positive impact of well-crafted design. I have over 15 years of experience spanning brand strategy, experiential marketing, and graphic design which includes working in a creative experience agency, in-house marketing team, and freelance. My client portfolio ranges from local businesses to nonprofits to international organizations in the Global 500.  

I am the owner and art director of Via Visual, a design studio in Austin. I'm also a guest photographer for Creative Mornings/Austin and a volunteer Programming Lead for Austin Design Week.

experiences.title: Founder & Creative Director
experiences.jobDescription: We partner with new and established businesses to solve visual challenges through thoughtful brand strategy and design. By deeply understanding goals and context, we transform brand messages into tangible, well-crafted experiences that resonate with audiences—across live events, hospitality, wine, and brand-led environments., Via Visual | Branding & Experiential Design

experiences.title: Lifestyle Photographer
experiences.jobDescription: A lifestyle and live event photography.

experiences.title: RED VELVET
experiences.jobDescription: As Art Director, I lead the creative process within the project. I generate innovative concepts for our B2B clients’ programs and initiatives and bring these solutions to life with the broader team, which includes collaborating with the account, program, and marketing teams as well as contractors and vendors. In addition to ideation, I'm responsible for designing physical and digital materials for our experiences, including (but not limited to) persuasive custom proposals, signage, event-related collateral, branding and decor., RED VELVET is a global creative experience agency. We design positive, lasting experiences, events, and activations that are grounded in our partners’ brands and their mission.

recommendationsReceived.caption: November 14, 2024, Rachel was Chris’ client
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Fractional CMO + Integrator for founder-led companies between $5M–$20M | 12+ years building marketing systems + growth engines

fixedListComponent.text: Chris is so multi-talented that you'll probably see his face when you look up "Unicorn" in the dictionary. I've worked with him on several projects and am continually impressed with his creative talent, but also his ability to 'read between the lines' and transform the vision inside your head into reality. I also appreciate that he's dedicated to keeping up with the ever-changing trends in design, marketing, and branding. It makes it so easy to work with him since I can trust his keen eye and experienced perspective implicitly. On top of it all, he's just a great guy who leads with integrity, is easy to work with, and truly cares about his customers and their business. Anyone who works with him should consider themselves extremely fortunate.

I had the pleasure of working with Chris to create a logo for my brand and to get professional headshots and let me tell you, Chris absolutely delivered on both! The headshots: I told Chris from the beginning that I did not want the traditional headshot look and after he took some time to get to know me, as a person and a professional, he found the perfect spot to take pictures, provided direction on how to pose (since I've never really done professional pictures before) and made me smile throughout the shoot! After picking my favorite headshots, he edited them beautifully and I cannot wait to show them off to the world! The logo: I met with Chris and explained to him my brand and future business. Chris took the time to really get to know me and my brand/future business. I was so pleased with our conversation and the time he took to get to know me and my brand, that when he sent over the design he came up with, it was EXACTLY what I had hoped for and WAY more! The creativity of the logo, the detail in it and the intentions he put behind each part of it, was just perfect! Chris really understood my vision and perfectly put it into a design! Words cannot express how thankful I am for Chris and I definitely plan on using him again in the future!

recommendations.caption: February 3, 2014, Chris was Joni Kat’s client
recommendations.subtitle: Visual storyteller and content partner crafting engaging virtual tours, captivating photography, and compelling video for my clients

fixedListComponent.text: If you are looking for a Google Trusted photographer look no further than Joni. We hired her to photograph our four retail locations, three of which are over 25,000 square feet. She was thorough, easy to work with, and very flexible to accommodate our tight schedule. Joni didn't just hide behind the camera but maintained a clear line of communication with us throughout the process. Her virtual tour and still photos for Russo Power Equipment speak for themselves. Highly recommended.
